data.name: CannotFindFile
data.value: Could not find file '{0}'.
data.comment: {0} is the file path.

data.name: Common_CannotBeNullOrEmpty
data.value: The parameter should not be null or empty.
data.comment: {Locked="null"}

data.name: DeploymentErrorBadDeploymentItem
data.value: Test Run deployment issue: Bad deployment item: '{0}': output directory '{1}' specifies the item to be deployed outside deployment root directory which is not allowed.
data.comment: {0} is the deployment item path. {1} is the output directory.

data.name: DeploymentErrorFailedToAccesOutputDirectory
data.value: Test Run deployment issue: Failed to access output directory '{1}' specified by deployment item '{0}', the item will not be deployed: {2}: {3}
data.comment: {0} is the deployment item path. {1} is the output directory. {2} is the exception type. {3} is the exception message.

data.name: DeploymentErrorFailedToAccessFile
data.value: Test Run deployment issue: Failed to access the file '{0}': {1}: {2}
data.comment: {0} is the file path. {1} is the exception type. {2} is the exception message.

data.name: DeploymentErrorFailedToCopyWithOverwrite
data.value: Test Run deployment issue: Failed to copy file '{0}' to '{1}': {2}: {3} (HResult: 0x{4:X8})
data.comment: {0} is the source file path. {1} is the destination file path. {2} is the exception type. {3} is the exception message. {4} is the exception HResult.

data.name: DeploymentErrorFailedToDeployDependencies
data.value: Test Run deployment issue: Failed to deploy dependencies for test storage '{0}': {1}
data.comment: {0} is the test storage or source path. {1} is the exception details.

data.name: DeploymentErrorFailedToGetFileForDeploymentItem
data.value: Test Run deployment issue: Failed to get the file for {0}: {1}: {2}
data.comment: {0} is the deployment item description. {1} is the exception type. {2} is the exception message.

data.name: DeploymentErrorGettingSatellite
data.value: Test Run deployment issue: an error occurred while getting satellite assemblies for {0}: {1}: {2}
data.comment: {0} is the deployment item. {1} is the exception type. {2} is the exception message.

data.name: DeploymentItem
data.value: deployment item '{0}'
data.comment: {0} is the deployment item path.

data.name: DeploymentItemContainsInvalidCharacters
data.value: Invalid deployment item: the specified path '{0}' or output directory '{1}' contains illegal characters.
data.comment: {0} is the deployment item path. {1} is the output directory.

data.name: DeploymentItemOutputDirectoryCannotBeNull
data.value: Invalid deployment item: the output directory cannot be null.
data.comment: {Locked="null"}

data.name: DeploymentItemOutputDirectoryMustBeRelative
data.value: Invalid deployment item: the specified output directory '{0}' is not relative.
data.comment: {0} is the output directory.

data.name: DeploymentItemPathCannotBeNullOrEmpty
data.value: Invalid deployment item: the path must contain at least one character.

data.name: DeploymentItemWithOutputDirectory
data.value: deployment item '{0}' (output directory '{1}')
data.comment: {0} is the deployment item path. {1} is the output directory.

data.name: InvalidSettingsXmlElement
data.value: MSTestAdapter encountered an unexpected element '{0}' in its settings '{1}'. Remove this element and try again.
data.comment: {0} is the unexpected XML element name. {1} is the settings section name. {Locked="MSTestAdapter"}

data.name: InvalidSettingsXml
data.value: MSTestAdapter failed to parse the runsettings XML.
data.comment: {Locked="MSTestAdapter"}{Locked="runsettings"}

data.name: DeploymentDependencyLoadFailed
data.value: Test Run deployment issue: Failed to load the assembly or module '{0}'. Reason: {1}
data.comment: {0} is the assembly or module path. {1} is the reason the assembly or module could not be loaded.

data.name: MissingDeploymentDependency
data.value: Test Run deployment issue: The assembly or module '{0}' was not found. Reason: {1}
data.comment: {0} is the assembly or module name. {1} is the reason the dependency was not found.

data.name: MissingDeploymentDependencyWithoutReason
data.value: Test Run deployment issue: The assembly or module '{0}' was not found.
data.comment: {0} is the assembly or module name.

data.name: TestRunName
data.comment: {0} is the deployment folder prefix. {1} is the user name. {2} is the date/time and process id suffix.

data.name: UTA_DataSourceConfigurationSectionMissing
data.value: Data source '{0}' cannot be found in the test configuration settings
data.comment: {0} is the data source name.

data.name: UTA_ErrorDataConnectionFailed
data.value: The unit test adapter failed to connect to the data source or to read the data. For more information on troubleshooting this error, see "Troubleshooting Data-Driven Unit Tests" (http://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=62412) in the MSDN Library. Error details: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the error details. {Locked="http://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=62412"}{Locked="MSDN"}

data.name: WrongNumberOfObjects
data.value: Wrong number of objects for permutation. Should be greater than zero.

data.name: InvalidValue
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' for runsettings entry '{1}', setting will be ignored.
data.comment: {0} is the invalid value. {1} is the runsettings entry name. {Locked="runsettings"}

data.name: InvalidTimeoutValue
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' for runsettings entry '{1}'. The timeout must be a strictly positive integer (in milliseconds); a value of 0 or less is not allowed. Omit the entry to use the default (no timeout). The setting will be ignored.
data.comment: {0} is the invalid value. {1} is the runsettings entry name. {Locked="runsettings"}

data.name: AssemblyCleanupTimedOut
data.value: Assembly cleanup method '{0}.{1}' timed out after {2}ms
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the assembly cleanup method name. {2} is the timeout in milliseconds.

data.name: AssemblyCleanupWasCancelled
data.value: Assembly cleanup method '{0}.{1}' was canceled
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the assembly cleanup method name.

data.name: AssemblyInitializeTimedOut
data.value: Assembly initialize method '{0}.{1}' timed out after {2}ms
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the assembly initialize method name. {2} is the timeout in milliseconds.

data.name: AssemblyInitializeWasCancelled
data.value: Assembly initialize method '{0}.{1}' was canceled
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the assembly initialize method name.

data.name: AttachmentSetDisplayName
data.value: MSTestAdapterV2
data.comment: {Locked="MSTestAdapterV2"}

data.name: CannotEnumerateIDataSourceAttribute
data.value: Exception occurred while enumerating IDataSource attribute on "{0}.{1}": {2}
data.comment: {0} is the type name with namespace. {1} is the method name. {2} is the exception details. {Locked="IDataSource"}

data.name: CannotExpandIDataSourceAttribute
data.value: Exception occurred while expanding IDataSource rows from attribute on "{0}.{1}": {2}
data.comment: {0} is the type name with namespace. {1} is the method name. {2} is the row expansion warning. {Locked="IDataSource"}{Locked="CannotExpandIDataSourceAttribute_DuplicateDisplayName"}{Locked="CannotExpandIDataSourceAttribute_CannotSerialize"}

data.name: CannotExpandIDataSourceAttribute_CannotSerialize
data.value: Data on index {0} for "{1}" cannot be serialized. All data provided through "IDataSource" should be serializable. If you need to test non-serializable data sources, please make sure you add "TestDataSourceDiscovery" attribute on your test assembly and set the discovery option to "DuringExecution".
data.comment: {0} is the zero-based data row index. {1} is the test name. {Locked="IDataSource"}{Locked="TestDataSourceDiscovery"}{Locked="DuringExecution"}

data.name: CannotRunTestArgumentsMismatchError
data.value: Cannot run test method '{0}.{1}': Test data doesn't match method parameters. Either the count or types are different. Test expected {2} parameter(s), with types '{3}', but received {4} argument(s), with types '{5}'.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type full name. {1} is the method name. {2} is the expected parameter count. {3} is the expected parameter type list. {4} is the received argument count. {5} is the received argument type list.

data.name: CannotRunTestMethodNoDataError
data.value: Cannot run test method '{0}.{1}': Method has parameters, but does not define any test source. Use '[DataRow]', '[DynamicData]', or a custom 'ITestDataSource' data source to provide test data.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type full name. {1} is the method name. {Locked="[DataRow]"}{Locked="[DynamicData]"}{Locked="ITestDataSource"}

data.name: ClassCleanupTimedOut
data.value: Class cleanup method '{0}.{1}' timed out after {2}ms
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the class cleanup method name. {2} is the timeout in milliseconds.

data.name: ClassCleanupWasCancelled
data.value: Class cleanup method '{0}.{1}' was canceled
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the class cleanup method name.

data.name: ClassInitializeTimedOut
data.value: Class initialize method '{0}.{1}' timed out after {2}ms
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the class initialize method name. {2} is the timeout in milliseconds.

data.name: ClassInitializeWasCancelled
data.value: Class initialize method '{0}.{1}' was canceled
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the class initialize method name.

data.name: CouldNotInspectTypeDuringDiscovery
data.value: MSTestAdapter failed to discover tests in class '{0}' of assembly '{1}' because {2}.
data.comment: {0} is the class name. {1} is the assembly path. {2} is the failure reason. {Locked="MSTestAdapter"}

data.name: DataDrivenResultDisplayName
data.value: {0} (Data Row {1})
data.comment: {0} is the test display name. {1} is the data row index.

data.name: DebugTraceBanner
data.value: Debug Trace:

data.name: DiscoveryWarning
data.value: [MSTest][Discovery][{0}] {1}
data.comment: {0} is the source path. {1} is the discovery warning message. {Locked="[MSTest][Discovery]"}

data.name: DuplicateConfigurationError
data.value: Both '.runsettings' and '.testconfig.json' files have been detected. Please select only one of these test configuration files.
data.comment: {Locked=".runsettings"}{Locked=".testconfig.json"}

data.name: ExceptionOccuredWhileGettingTheExceptionDescription
data.value: "{0}": (Failed to get exception description due to an exception of type "{1}".
data.comment: {0} is the type of the original exception. {1} is the thrown exception type.

data.name: Execution_Test_Cancelled
data.value: Test '{0}' was canceled
data.comment: {0} is the test name.

data.name: Execution_Test_Timeout
data.value: Test '{0}' timed out after {1}ms
data.comment: {0} is the test name. {1} is the timeout in milliseconds.

data.name: FailedToGetCustomAttribute
data.value: Getting custom attributes for type {0} threw exception (will ignore and use the reflection way): {1}
data.comment: {0} is the attribute full type name. {1} is the exception description.

data.name: GenericParameterCantBeInferred
data.value: The type of the generic parameter '{0}' could not be inferred.
data.comment: {0} is the generic parameter name.

data.name: GenericParameterCantBeInferredBecauseNoArguments
data.value: The generic test method '{0}' doesn't have arguments, so the generic parameter cannot be inferred.
data.comment: {0} is the generic test method name.

data.name: GenericParameterConflict
data.value: Found two conflicting types for generic parameter '{0}'. The conflicting types are '{1}' and '{2}'.
data.comment: {0} is the generic parameter name. {1} is the first conflicting type. {2} is the second conflicting type.

data.name: GlobalTestCleanupTimedOut
data.value: Global test cleanup method '{0}.{1}' timed out after {2}ms
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the global test cleanup method name. {2} is the timeout in milliseconds.

data.name: GlobalTestCleanupWasCancelled
data.value: Global test cleanup method '{0}.{1}' was canceled
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the global test cleanup method name.

data.name: GlobalTestInitializeTimedOut
data.value: Global test initialize method '{0}.{1}' timed out after {2}ms
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the global test initialize method name. {2} is the timeout in milliseconds.

data.name: GlobalTestInitializeWasCancelled
data.value: Global test initialize method '{0}.{1}' was canceled
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the global test initialize method name.

data.name: InvalidParallelScopeValue
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' specified for 'Scope'. Supported scopes are {1}.
data.comment: {0} is the invalid scope value. {1} is the supported scope list. {Locked="Scope"}

data.name: InvalidParallelWorkersValue
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' specified for 'Workers'. The value should be a non-negative integer.
data.comment: {0} is the invalid worker count. {Locked="Workers"}

data.name: InvalidSettingsXmlAttribute
data.value: Invalid settings '{0}'. Unexpected XmlAttribute: '{1}'.
data.comment: {0} is the settings element name. {1} is the unexpected XML attribute name. {Locked="XmlAttribute"}

data.name: OlderTFMVersionFound
data.value: An older version of MSTestV2 package is loaded in assembly, test discovery might fail to discover all data tests if they depend on `.runsettings` file.
data.comment: {Locked="MSTestV2"}{Locked=".runsettings"}

data.name: SourcesNotSupported
data.value: Running tests in any of the provided sources is not supported for the selected platform

data.name: TestAssembly_FileDoesNotExist
data.value: File does not exist: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the file path.

data.name: TestCleanupTimedOut
data.value: Test cleanup method '{0}.{1}' timed out after {2}ms
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the test cleanup method name. {2} is the timeout in milliseconds.

data.name: TestCleanupWasCancelled
data.value: Test cleanup method '{0}.{1}' was canceled
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the test cleanup method name.

data.name: TestContextMessageBanner
data.value: TestContext Messages:
data.comment: {Locked="TestContext"}

data.name: TestInitializeTimedOut
data.value: Test initialize method '{0}.{1}' timed out after {2}ms
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the test initialize method name. {2} is the timeout in milliseconds.

data.name: TestInitializeWasCancelled
data.value: Test initialize method '{0}.{1}' was canceled
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the test initialize method name.

data.name: TestNotFound
data.value: Test method {0} was not found.
data.comment: {0} is the test method name.

data.name: TestParallelizationBanner
data.value: Test Parallelization enabled for {0} (Workers: {1}, Scope: {2})
data.comment: {0} is the test source path. {1} is the worker count. {2} is the parallelization scope. {Locked="Workers"}{Locked="Scope"}

data.name: RandomTestOrderBanner
data.value: Random test order enabled (Seed: {0}). Set 'RandomTestOrderSeed' to reproduce this order.
data.comment: {0} is the random test order seed. {Locked="Seed"}{Locked="RandomTestOrderSeed"}

data.name: RandomTestOrderAndOrderTestsByNameInClassConflict
data.value: Both 'RandomizeTestOrder' and 'OrderTestsByNameInClass' are set. 'OrderTestsByNameInClass' will be ignored.
data.comment: {Locked="RandomizeTestOrder"}{Locked="OrderTestsByNameInClass"}

data.name: DeprecatedFlatOrderTestsByNameInClassKey
data.value: The 'mstest:orderTestsByNameInClass' configuration key is deprecated and will be removed in a future version. Use 'mstest:execution:orderTestsByNameInClass' instead.
data.comment: {Locked="mstest:orderTestsByNameInClass"}{Locked="mstest:execution:orderTestsByNameInClass"}

data.name: UTA_AssemblyCleanupMethodWasUnsuccesful
data.value: Assembly Cleanup method {0}.{1} failed. Error Message: {2}. StackTrace: {3}
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the assembly cleanup method name. {2} is the error message. {3} is the stack trace.

data.name: UTA_AssemblyInitMethodThrows
data.value: Assembly Initialization method {0}.{1} threw exception. {2}: {3}. Aborting test execution.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the assembly initialization method name. {2} is the exception type. {3} is the exception message.

data.name: UTA_ClassCleanupMethodWasUnsuccesful
data.value: Class Cleanup method {0}.{1} failed. Error Message: {2}. Stack Trace: {3}
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the class cleanup method name. {2} is the error message. {3} is the stack trace.

data.name: UTA_ClassInitMethodThrows
data.value: Class Initialization method {0}.{1} threw exception. {2}: {3}.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the class initialization method name. {2} is the exception type. {3} is the exception message.

data.name: UTA_ClassOrAssemblyCleanupMethodHasWrongSignature
data.value: Method {0}.{1} has wrong signature. The method must be static, public, does not return a value and should not take any parameter. Additionally, if you are using async-await in method then return-type must be 'Task' or 'ValueTask'.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the method name. {Locked="static"}{Locked="public"}{Locked="Task"}{Locked="ValueTask"}{Locked="async-await"}

data.name: UTA_ClassOrAssemblyInitializeMethodHasWrongSignature
data.value: Method {0}.{1} has wrong signature. The method must be static, public, does not return a value and should take a single parameter of type TestContext. Additionally, if you are using async-await in method then return-type must be 'Task' or 'ValueTask'.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the method name. {Locked="static"}{Locked="public"}{Locked="TestContext"}{Locked="Task"}{Locked="ValueTask"}{Locked="async-await"}

data.name: UTA_CleanupMethodThrows
data.value: TestCleanup method {0}.{1} threw exception. {2}.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the test cleanup method name. {2} is the exception details. {Locked="TestCleanup"}

data.name: UTA_CleanupMethodThrowsGeneralError
data.value: Error calling Test Cleanup method for test class {0}: {1}
data.comment: {0} is the test class name. {1} is the exception message.

data.name: UTA_EndOfInnerExceptionTrace
data.value: --- End of inner exception stack trace ---

data.name: UTA_ErrorIncorrectTestMethodSignature
data.value: UTA007: Method {1} defined in class {0} does not have correct signature. Test method marked with the [TestMethod] attribute must be non-static, public, return-type as void and should not take any parameter. Example: public void Test.Class1.Test(). Additionally, if you are using async-await in test method then return-type must be 'Task' or 'ValueTask'. Example: public async Task Test.Class1.Test2()
data.comment: {0} is the test class full name. {1} is the test method name. {Locked="UTA007"}{Locked="[TestMethod]"}{Locked="non-static"}{Locked="public"}{Locked="void"}{Locked="async-await"}{Locked="Task"}{Locked="public void Test.Class1.Test()"}{Locked="public async Task Test.Class1.Test2()"}

data.name: UTA_ErrorGenericValueTaskReturnType
data.value: UTA007: Method {1} defined in class {0} does not have correct signature. 'ValueTask<T>' is not a valid test method return type; use the non-generic 'ValueTask' instead. Example: public async ValueTask Test.Class1.Test()
data.comment: {0} is the test class full name. {1} is the test method name. {Locked="UTA007"}{Locked="ValueTask<T>"}{Locked="ValueTask"}{Locked="public async ValueTask Test.Class1.Test()"}

data.name: UTA_ErrorInValidTestContextSignature
data.value: UTA031: class {0} does not have valid TestContext property. TestContext must be of type TestContext, must be non-static, and must be public. For example: public TestContext TestContext.
data.comment: {0} is the test class name. {Locked="UTA031"}{Locked="TestContext"}{Locked="non-static"}{Locked="public"}{Locked="public TestContext TestContext"}

data.name: UTA_ErrorInvalidTimeout
data.value: UTA054: {0}.{1} has invalid Timeout attribute. The timeout must be an integer value greater than 0.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the method name. {Locked="UTA054"}{Locked="Timeout"}

data.name: UTA_ErrorMultiAssemblyClean
data.value: UTA014: {0}: Cannot define more than one method with the AssemblyCleanup attribute inside an assembly.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type full name. {Locked="UTA014"}{Locked="AssemblyCleanup"}

data.name: UTA_ErrorMultiAssemblyInit
data.value: UTA013: {0}: Cannot define more than one method with the AssemblyInitialize attribute inside an assembly.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type full name. {Locked="UTA013"}{Locked="AssemblyInitialize"}

data.name: UTA_AssemblyFixtureProviderTypeIsGeneric
data.value: UTA070: Type '{0}' referenced by [AssemblyFixtureProvider] must not be generic.
data.comment: {0} is the fixture provider type name. {Locked="UTA070"}{Locked="[AssemblyFixtureProvider]"}

data.name: UTA_AssemblyFixtureProviderTypeReflectionFailed
data.value: UTA071: Failed to enumerate methods on type '{0}' referenced by [AssemblyFixtureProvider]. {1}
data.comment: {0} is the fixture provider type name. {1} is the exception details. {Locked="UTA071"}{Locked="[AssemblyFixtureProvider]"}

data.name: UTA_AssemblyFixtureProviderLoadFailed
data.value: UTA072: Failed to load [AssemblyFixtureProvider] marker from assembly '{0}'. {1}
data.comment: {0} is the assembly path. {1} is the exception details. {Locked="UTA072"}{Locked="[AssemblyFixtureProvider]"}

data.name: UTA_TestFilterProviderLoadFailed
data.value: UTA073: Failed to load [TestFilterProvider] marker from assembly '{0}'. {1}
data.comment: {0} is the assembly path. {1} is the exception details. {Locked="UTA073"}{Locked="[TestFilterProvider]"}

data.name: UTA_TestFilterProviderTypeIsGeneric
data.value: UTA074: Type '{0}' referenced by [TestFilterProvider] must not be generic.
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {Locked="UTA074"}{Locked="[TestFilterProvider]"}

data.name: UTA_TestFilterProviderTypeIsNotInstantiable
data.value: UTA075: Type '{0}' referenced by [TestFilterProvider] must be a concrete class, not an interface or abstract class.
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {Locked="UTA075"}{Locked="[TestFilterProvider]"}

data.name: UTA_TestFilterProviderTypeDoesNotImplementInterface
data.value: UTA076: Type '{0}' referenced by [TestFilterProvider] must implement '{1}'.
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the required interface name. {Locked="UTA076"}{Locked="[TestFilterProvider]"}

data.name: UTA_TestFilterProviderInstantiationFailed
data.value: UTA077: Failed to instantiate type '{0}' referenced by [TestFilterProvider]. The type must declare a public parameterless constructor. {1}
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the exception details. {Locked="UTA077"}{Locked="[TestFilterProvider]"}

data.name: UTA_TestFilterProviderThrew
data.value: UTA078: The [TestFilterProvider] filter '{0}' threw an exception while evaluating test '{1}'. {2}
data.comment: {0} is the filter type name. {1} is the test name. {2} is the exception details. {Locked="UTA078"}{Locked="[TestFilterProvider]"}

data.name: UTA_TestFilterProviderMultipleDeclared
data.value: UTA079: Assembly '{0}' declares more than one [TestFilterProvider] attribute. At most one is allowed per test assembly; compose multiple filtering strategies inside a single ITestFilter implementation.
data.comment: {0} is the assembly path. {Locked="UTA079"}{Locked="[TestFilterProvider]"}{Locked="ITestFilter"}

data.name: UTA_ErrorMultiClassClean
data.value: UTA026: {0}: Cannot define more than one method with the ClassCleanup attribute inside a class.
data.comment: {0} is the test class full name. {Locked="UTA026"}{Locked="ClassCleanup"}

data.name: UTA_ErrorMultiClassInit
data.value: UTA025: {0}: Cannot define more than one method with the ClassInitialize attribute inside a class.
data.comment: {0} is the test class full name. {Locked="UTA025"}{Locked="ClassInitialize"}

data.name: UTA_ErrorMultiClean
data.value: UTA024: {0}: Cannot define more than one method with the TestCleanup attribute.
data.comment: {0} is the test class full name. {Locked="UTA024"}{Locked="TestCleanup"}

data.name: UTA_ErrorMultiInit
data.value: UTA018: {0}: Cannot define more than one method with the TestInitialize attribute.
data.comment: {0} is the test class full name. {Locked="UTA018"}{Locked="TestInitialize"}

data.name: UTA_ErrorNonPublicTestClass
data.value: UTA001: TestClass attribute defined on non-public class {0}
data.comment: {0} is the test class full name. {Locked="UTA001"}{Locked="TestClass"}

data.name: UTA_ErrorTestClassIsGenericNonAbstract
data.value: TestClass attribute defined on generic non-abstract class {0}
data.comment: {0} is the test class full name. {Locked="TestClass"}

data.name: UTA_ExecuteThrewException
data.value: An unhandled exception was thrown by the 'Execute' method. Please report this error to the author of the attribute '{0}'. {1}
data.comment: {0} is the attribute type name. {1} is the exception details. {Locked="Execute"}

data.name: UTA_FailedToGetTestMethodException
data.value: Failed to obtain the exception thrown by test method {0}.{1}.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the test method name.

data.name: UTA_InitMethodThrows
data.value: Initialization method {0}.{1} threw exception. {2}.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the initialization method name. {2} is the exception details.

data.name: UTA_InstanceCreationError
data.value: Unable to create instance of class {0}. Error: {1}.
data.comment: {0} is the test class name. {1} is the error message.

data.name: UTA_MethodDoesNotExists
data.value: Method {0}.{1} does not exist.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the method name.

data.name: UTA_MultipleAttributesOnTestMethod
data.value: The test method '{0}.{1}' has multiple attributes derived from '{2}' defined on it. Only one such attribute is allowed.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the test method name. {2} is the attribute base type name.

data.name: UTA_MultipleAttributesOnTestClass
data.value: The test class '{0}' has multiple attributes derived from '{1}' defined on it. Only one such attribute is allowed.
data.comment: {0} is the test class name. {1} is the attribute base type name.

data.name: UTA_NoTestResult
data.value: Error in executing test. No result returned by extension. If using extension of TestMethodAttribute then please contact vendor.
data.comment: {Locked="TestMethodAttribute"}

data.name: UTA_NoValidConstructor
data.value: Cannot find a valid constructor for test class '{0}'. Valid constructors are 'public' and either parameterless or with one parameter of type 'TestContext'.
data.comment: {0} is the test class name. {Locked="public"}{Locked="TestContext"}

data.name: UTA_TestContextLoadError
data.value: Unable to find property {0}.TestContext. Error:{1}.
data.comment: {0} is the test class name. {1} is the error message. {Locked="TestContext"}

data.name: UTA_TestContextSetError
data.value: Unable to set TestContext property for the class {0}. Error: {1}.
data.comment: {0} is the test class name. {1} is the error message. {Locked="TestContext"}

data.name: UTA_TestContextTypeMismatchLoadError
data.value: The {0}.TestContext has incorrect type.
data.comment: {0} is the test class name. {Locked="TestContext"}

data.name: UTA_TestInitializeAndCleanupMethodHasWrongSignature
data.value: Method {0}.{1} has wrong signature. The method must be non-static, public, does not return a value and should not take any parameter. Additionally, if you are using async-await in method then return-type must be 'Task' or 'ValueTask'.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the method name. {Locked="non-static"}{Locked="public"}{Locked="Task"}{Locked="ValueTask"}{Locked="async-await"}

data.name: UTA_TestMethodThrows
data.value: Test method {0}.{1} threw exception: {2}
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the test method name. {2} is the exception details.

data.name: UTA_TypeLoadError
data.value: Unable to get type {0}. Error: {1}.
data.comment: {0} is the type name. {1} is the error message.

data.name: UTA_UserCodeThrewNullValueException
data.value: The called code threw an exception that was caught, but the exception value was null
data.comment: {Locked="null"}

data.name: UTA_WrongThread
data.value: {0} For UWP projects, if you are using UI objects in test consider using [UITestMethod] attribute instead of [TestMethod] to execute test in UI thread.
data.comment: {0} is the original error message. {Locked="UWP"}{Locked="[UITestMethod]"}{Locked="[TestMethod]"}

data.name: UTF_FailedToGetExceptionMessage
data.value: (Failed to get the message for an exception of type {0} due to an exception.)
data.comment: {0} is the exception type name.

data.name: STAIsOnlySupportedOnWindowsWarning
data.value: Runsettings entry '<ExecutionApartmentState>STA</ExecutionApartmentState>' is not supported on non-Windows OSes.
data.comment: {Locked="Runsettings"}{Locked="<ExecutionApartmentState>STA</ExecutionApartmentState>"}{Locked="STA"}

data.name: VersionMismatchBetweenAdapterAndFramework
data.value: 'MSTest.TestAdapter' and 'MSTest.TestFramework' must have the same version. Found 'MSTest.TestAdapter' version '{0}' and 'MSTest.TestFramework' version '{1}'. Please make sure that the versions of 'MSTest.TestAdapter' and 'MSTest.TestFramework' NuGet packages have the same version.
data.comment: {0} is the MSTest.TestAdapter version. {1} is the MSTest.TestFramework version. {Locked="MSTest.TestAdapter"}{Locked="MSTest.TestFramework"}{Locked="NuGet"}

data.name: DiscoveryErrors
data.value: Discovery failed for source '{0}' with {1} errors: {2}
data.comment: {0} is the source path. {1} is the error count. {2} is the error details.

data.name: UTA_OutRefParametersNotSupported
data.value: Warning: Test method '{0}.{1}' has 'out' or 'ref' parameters which are not supported and may be disallowed in a future version of MSTest.
data.comment: {0} is the declaring type name. {1} is the test method name. {Locked="out"}{Locked="ref"}{Locked="MSTest"}

data.name: DuplicateAttributeError
data.value: Only one attribute of type '{0}' is allowed, but multiple were found.
data.comment: {0} is the attribute type name.
